allow: Bash(git -C pleasync-client add README.md package.json .npmignore .github/ examples/ npm/)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('default_branch:',d['default_branch']\); print\('private:',d['private']\); print\('fork:',d['fork']\); print\('owner:',d['owner']['login']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('display_title:', d.get\('display_title'\)\); print\('event:', d.get\('event'\)\); print\('path:', d.get\('path'\)\); print\('head_branch:', d.get\('head_branch'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total_jobs:', len\(d.get\('jobs',[]\)\)\); [print\(j.get\('name'\), '|', j.get\('conclusion'\), '|', j.get\('status'\)\) for j in d.get\('jobs',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t.get\('name'\)\) for t in d[:15]]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(w.get\('name'\), '|', w.get\('state'\), '|', w.get\('path'\)\) for w in d.get\('workflows',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('workflow_id:', d.get\('workflow_id'\)\); print\('workflow_url:', d.get\('workflow_url'\)\); print\('actor:', d.get\('actor',{}\).get\('login'\)\); print\('triggering_actor:', d.get\('triggering_actor',{}\).get\('login'\)\); print\('head_branch:', d.get\('head_branch'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(w.get\('id'\), '|', w.get\('name'\)\) for w in d.get\('workflows',[]\)]")
Bash(git -C pleasync-client commit -m 'chore\(ci\): retry CI run with comment-only change *)
Bash(git -C pleasync-client commit -m "chore\(ci\): add sanity workflow for diagnosis")
Bash(git -C pleasync-client commit -m "chore\(ci\): remove diagnostic sanity workflow")
Bash(git -C pleasync-client tag v0.1.1-beta.1 -m "Release v0.1.1-beta.1: 複数 platform 対応の初回 beta")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('versions:', list\(d.get\('versions',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('time:', d.get\('time'\)\)")
Bash(git -C pleasync-client tag v0.1.1-beta.2 -m "Release v0.1.1-beta.2: release flow fix")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('versions:', list\(d.get\('versions',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('dist-tags:', d.get\('dist-tags'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d['name']\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('main:', d['main']\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d['name']\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('os:', d.get\('os'\)\); print\('cpu:', d.get\('cpu'\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table OwningProcess, State)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('platform pkg:', d['name'], d['version']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).split\('\\n'\); body = '\\n'.join\(lines[:-2]\); status = lines[-2] if len\(lines\) >= 2 else ''; import json; print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(body\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\); print\(status\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "still listening" } else { Write-Output "port 3000 free" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('readme',''\); print\('readme length:', len\(r\)\); print\('readme top 200 chars:'\); print\(r[:200]\)")
